title: Ecom Express is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Ecom Express is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Ecom Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!
